featuredProjects.title: Data Intelligence Hub
featuredProjects.description: AI-driven analytics platform with Django REST + Flask APIs, JWT-secured data exchange, and Gemini LLM integration for natural-language analytics queries. Accelerated data insights generation by 3×.

details.challenge: Organizations struggle to extract actionable insights from large datasets quickly, requiring technical SQL knowledge.
details.solution: Built an AI-assisted analytics hub allowing natural language queries through Gemini LLM integration, with secure JWT authentication and containerized deployment.
keyFeatures: Natural language to SQL query conversion

featuredProjects.title: EchoAI - Speech Coaching Platform
featuredProjects.description: Real-time speech intelligence engine using TensorFlow.js and WebSockets, achieving sub-100ms latency. AI-powered coaching for 100+ active users with MongoDB persistence.

details.challenge: Language learners need real-time feedback on pronunciation, pacing, and clarity but lack accessible coaching tools.
details.solution: Developed a real-time speech analysis platform using TensorFlow.js for browser-based ML inference and WebSockets for instant feedback.

featuredProjects.title: Cross-Border Payment Routing Analyzer
featuredProjects.description: Production-grade data product identifying $2B+ in hidden FX markup inefficiencies using causal inference (DiD, PSM, DoWhy) and ML-driven fee optimization with XGBoost + SHAP.

details.challenge: Global merchants lose billions in hidden FX fees due to suboptimal payment routing strategies.
details.solution: Built an explainable ML pipeline using causal inference techniques to identify fee optimization opportunities with automated ETL and Docker CI/CD.

allProjects.title: MedLens AR
allProjects.description: Medical AI platform combining FastAPI backend with React Native frontend for medical training with AR capabilities.

allProjects.title: SecureCode AI
allProjects.description: Automated vulnerability detection system achieving 98% accuracy using ML-based code analysis.

allProjects.title: Skin Disease Classification
allProjects.description: Distributed training pipeline with PyTorch DDP achieving 4× speedup with 91% accuracy across 35 disease classes.

allProjects.title: Walmart Sales Analysis
allProjects.description: Analyzed 45K+ transactional records using Python to uncover seasonal trends and identify 12% improvement potential.

allProjects.title: GridSentry
allProjects.description: AI-powered electric grid forecasting system using deep learning to predict energy demand with 95% accuracy.

allProjects.title: GRU and LSTM-Based Image Captioning Models
allProjects.description: Image captioning model using CNN + LSTM achieving 80% accuracy on Flickr8k dataset.

allProjects.title: Fine-Tuning CLIP and Diffusion Model for Image Generation
allProjects.description: Custom diffusion model fine-tuned on Flickr8k dataset with CLIP for improved image captioning.

allProjects.title: Space Exploration Database Management System
allProjects.description: Custom diffusion model fine-tuned on Flickr8k dataset with CLIP for improved image captioning.

allProjects.title: Plant Disease Detection
allProjects.description: This project uses PyTorch to build a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that detects plant diseases from leaf images.
